title: ViaVanillaPlus
description: Handles protocol changes in Vanilla+ mods, intended as an addon to ViaFabricPlus.
body:
Handles protocol changes in Vanilla+ mods, intended as an addon to ViaFabricPlus.

Currently supported mods are:
- [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet)
- [Syncmatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/syncmatica)
